description:
After what happened at the festival, Kaya lost her confidence in facing specters.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Hide-and-Seek Isn`t Scary / Cameras Aren`t Scary / Aunt Nana Isn`t Scary?
Kakurenbo wa Kowakunai / Camera wa Kowakunai / Oba no Nana wa Kowakunai?
かくれんぼはコワくない / カメラはコワくない / オバノナナはコワくない?
